recurring_credits.name: DoorDash Non-Restaurant Credit
recurring_credits.description: $10/quarter on one qualifying non-restaurant DoorDash order ($40/year total). Activation required.
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: $10 off discount each calendar quarter at checkout on one qualifying non-restaurant order on DoorDash (totaling up to $40 annually)

_review_reason: Schema rules applied: DashPass 1-yr excluded (Q4 promotional), $1k voucher after $30k spend excluded (Q1 conditional). Only $10/quarter DoorDash qualifies.
_excluded: 10% off Iberia flights via Chase link (ongoing discount)
